title: National Hunting, Trapping and Fishing Heritage Day Act
title_en: National Hunting, Trapping and Fishing Heritage Day Act
description: National Hunting, Trapping and Fishing Heritage Day Act (National Hunting, Trapping and Fishin...). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the National Hunting, Trapping and Fishing Heritage Day Act .

provisions.chapter: National Hunting, Trapping and Fishing Heritage Day
provisions.title: National Hunting, Trapping and Fishing Heritage Day
provisions.content: 2 Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the third Saturday in September is to be known as “National Hunting, Trapping and Fishing Heritage Day”.

provisions.chapter: National Hunting, Trapping and Fishing Heritage Day
provisions.title: Not a legal holiday
provisions.content: 3 For greater certainty, National Hunting, Trapping and Fishing Heritage Day is not a legal holiday or a non-juridical day.
